results.rendered_html:
upa-√stṛ P. Ā. -stṛṇāti, -stṛṇīte (Ā. 1. sg. -stire,  RV. ii, 31, 5 ; inf. -stire,  RV. v, 85, 1 , &c.; inf. used as Impv. -stṛṇiṣani,  RV. vi, 44, 6  [cf. gṛnīṣaṇi under √1. gṝ])
to spread over, cover with, clothe, wrap up,  RV. i, 162, 16 ; viii, 73, 3 ;  ŚBr. xiii ;  ŚāṅkhŚr. ;
to spread out under, spread or lay under, scatter under,  RV. ;  AV. ;  ŚBr.  ;
to scatter round, surround (the Āhavanīya and Gārhapatya fire with grass),  TBr. iii, 7, 4, 18 ;  TS. ;
(at sacrifices) to pour out (esp. clarified butter), pour out so as to form a lower layer or substratum,  TS. ;  AitBr. ;  ŚBr. ;  Kauś. ;  Gobh.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
upastṛ, -stṝ 5 9 U.
1 To spread out (for another); spread under.
2 To strew or cover with.
3 To arrange, set in order.
